_comment: EDIT THIS FILE to update the founder's name, story, values, and image. Replace the image src with the actual photo file path under /public/media/founder/.
name: Vidya Kalyankar
title: Founder, Orchid Unisex Salon & Spa
tagline: "A great salon isn't just about skills — it's about making every person feel seen, valued, and at home."
story: Vidya Kalyankar is not your typical salon founder. She didn't come from a beauty school or a professional styling background — she came from something arguably more powerful: a lifetime of nurturing people, managing households, and building genuine human connections.

As an entrepreneur and homemaker, Vidya understood better than most what it means to care for others — not as a transaction, but as a calling. When she envisioned Orchid Unisex Salon & Spa, her goal was simple: create a space where every client walks in feeling like a guest and walks out feeling like the best version of themselves.

Her exceptional people management instincts — honed through years of running a home and building relationships in the community of Kolhapur — shaped the very soul of Orchid. She personally handpicked the team, set the standards for hospitality, and ensured that warmth and trust are as much a part of the experience as any treatment.

Today, Orchid stands as Kolhapur's newest and most promising wellness destination — built not on fancy certifications, but on the genuine care and personal touch that Vidya has woven into every corner of the salon.

values.title: Genuine Warmth
values.description: Every client is welcomed like a guest in our home — with care, attention, and respect.

values.title: People First
values.description: Exceptional people management means our team is happy, skilled, and passionate about serving you.

values.title: Community Trust
values.description: Built on word-of-mouth and real relationships — our reputation comes from clients, not advertising.

certifications: Trained & Certified Salon Team under her supervision

image.alt: Vidya Kalyankar, Founder of Orchid Unisex Salon & Spa
image._note: To replace: copy your photo to /public/media/founder/founder.png (or .jpg) and update the src above.
